faqs.highlightSubtitle: We answer your most common questions.

q1.question: Who are we at Dentali Cactus?
q1.answer: We are a dental clinic founded in 2021 by Luis Jovany Arenas López, dedicated to providing high-quality dental care with a human, ethical, and personalized approach. We have modern facilities, cutting-edge technology, and a professional team committed to the health and trust of every patient.

q4.question: What makes Dentali Cactus different from other dental clinics?
q4.answer: What sets us apart is our human and ethical approach, personalized care, and commitment to clinical quality. At Dentali Cactus we combine cutting-edge technology, modern facilities, and a highly trained professional team to provide honest diagnoses, well-planned treatments, and a safe and reliable experience, all with fair and competitive prices that aim to make dental care accessible without compromising quality.

q2.question: Are treatments performed by specialists?
q2.answer: Yes, each treatment is performed by a specialist in their corresponding area.

q1.question: What payment methods are available?
q1.answer: We accept payments in cash, card, bank transfer, and cash deposits made at convenience stores such as Oxxo, Seven Eleven, or supermarkets to provide greater convenience.

q1.question: How often should I visit the dentist?
q1.answer: It is recommended to visit the dentist every six months for a check-up and cleaning, although the frequency may vary depending on each patient’s needs.

cta.title: Ready for your best smile?

aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.heroTagline: This is where your best smile begins
aboutPage.story2021Desc: Dentali Cactus was founded in April 2021, starting with a single dental unit and a strong commitment to growth and service. Thanks to the trust of our patients, that initial project steadily consolidated over time.
aboutPage.story2022Desc: This growth allowed us to open our second branch in Guadalupe Victoria km 43, expanding our reach and commitment to the community's oral health.
aboutPage.story2023Desc: We achieved one of our main objectives: creating larger, more modern and safer facilities for our patients. We began construction of a new location in a strategic area.
aboutPage.km57Details: The Dentali Cactus km 57 branch features five dental cubicles, a sterilization area, digital panoramic X-ray equipment, a pharmacy, a kitchen for staff and five offices dedicated to diagnosis and the development of personalized treatment plans.
aboutPage.storyMexicaliDesc: Recently, we opened our third branch in Mexicali, receiving a very favorable response from our patients and referrals, which reaffirms our commitment to continue growing.
aboutPage.storyContinued: Today, Dentali Cactus continues growing with the same essence that saw it born: commitment, professionalism and human closeness. Each of our branches has been designed with your comfort, safety and trust in mind, integrating cutting-edge technology with ethical and personalized care.
aboutPage.mission: To provide comprehensive dental health services of the highest quality, using cutting-edge technology and a team of specialists committed to the well-being of our patients. We seek to improve the oral health and quality of life of every person who trusts us, offering personalized treatments in a warm and professional environment.
aboutPage.vision: To be the leading dental clinic in the region, recognized for excellence in dental care, technological innovation and social commitment. We aspire to transform the dental experience of our patients by promoting prevention and comprehensive oral health care.
aboutPage.founderDesc: With a clear vision of providing excellent dental care, Luis Jovany Arenas López founded Dentali Cactus in 2021. His leadership and commitment have been fundamental to the growth of the clinic, taking it from a single dental unit to three branches in Baja California.
aboutPage.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide our work every day.
aboutPage.value1Desc: We are dedicated to improving our patients' oral health with comprehensive and personalized care.
aboutPage.value2Desc: We have highly trained specialists who are constantly updating their knowledge.
aboutPage.value3Desc: We treat every patient with empathy, respect and a close, caring approach.
aboutPage.value4Desc: We use top-quality materials and technology to guarantee the best results.
aboutPage.value5Desc: We provide clear diagnoses and fair budgets, with no surprises.
aboutPage.value6Desc: We actively contribute to the well-being of our community through social initiatives.
aboutPage.feature1Desc: We have digital and panoramic X-ray equipment within our facilities. You do not need to go anywhere else.
aboutPage.feature2Desc: We have a dental pharmacy integrated into our km 57 branch so you can find everything you need in one place.
aboutPage.feature3Desc: All our treatments are performed by certified specialists in each area of dentistry.
aboutPage.ejercitoDesc: In addition to our clinical commitment, we strongly believe in social responsibility. For this reason, we founded Army of Smiles, an initiative aimed at supporting the people who need it most in our community. Through this project we carry out annual activities such as the donation of school supplies and the event "Photo with Santa", seeking to bring smiles, hope and meaningful moments to children and families.
aboutPage.closingDesc: Our greatest goal is to accompany you through every stage of your oral health, offering comprehensive solutions that improve your quality of life and strengthen your smile.

specialistsPage.heroSubtitle: Our team of specialists is prepared to provide advanced treatments with modern technology and personalized care.

ortho.title: Orthodontics
ortho.intro: An orthodontic specialist is a dentist who, after completing their dental degree, completes a specialization in orthodontics (generally 2 to 3 years), focused on the diagnosis, prevention and treatment of malocclusions.
ortho.malocclusion2: Crossbite, open bite or deep bite
ortho.malocclusion4: Misalignments that affect function and aesthetics
ortho.diagnosis2: Analyzes X-rays, photographs and digital models
ortho.diagnosis3: Determines whether the problem is dental, skeletal or mixed
ortho.treatment1: Places and controls braces (metal, aesthetic, self-ligating)
ortho.treatment2: Uses orthopedic appliances in growing patients
ortho.treatment3: Provides periodic follow-up and makes adjustments during treatment
ortho.objective1: Achieve a functional and stable bite
ortho.objective4: Prevent wear, joint pain and future problems
ortho.interdisciplinary1: Collaborates with periodontists, rehabilitators, maxillofacial surgeons and pediatric dentists
ortho.interdisciplinary2: In some cases prepares the patient for orthognathic surgery
ortho.summary: The orthodontic specialist not only aligns teeth, but also corrects the way the jaws and teeth function together, seeking long-term health, stability and aesthetics.

endo.title: Endodontics
endo.intro: An endodontic specialist is the dentist responsible for saving teeth damaged by deep cavities, trauma or infections, preventing them from needing extraction. This is the specialist who performs endodontics, also known as root canal treatment.
endo.whatDo1: Removes infection or inflammation from inside the tooth
endo.whatDo2: Cleans and disinfects the root canals
endo.whatDo3: Seals the tooth to prevent new infections
endo.whatDo6: Retreats root canals that previously failed
endo.why3: Allows you to keep your natural tooth
endo.why4: Avoids extractions and more complex treatments
endo.summary: The endodontist removes the infection from inside the tooth and saves it so you can continue using your tooth normally.

pedo.title: Pediatric Dentistry
pedo.intro: A pediatric dentist is a dentist specialized in caring for the dental health of babies, children and adolescents. In addition to studying dentistry, they receive special training to care for children in a safe, patient and friendly way.
pedo.whatDoTitle: What does a pediatric dentist do?
pedo.whatDo1: Checks and cares for baby and permanent teeth
pedo.whatDo2: Prevents cavities with cleanings, fluoride and sealants
pedo.whatDo3: Treats cavities and dental pain in children
pedo.whatDo5: Guides proper dental and jaw growth
pedo.whatDo6: Teaches oral hygiene habits to children and parents
pedo.whyTitle: Why is it important to take children to a pediatric dentist?
pedo.why1: Helps children not be afraid of the dentist
pedo.why3: Protects teeth from an early age
pedo.why4: Lays the foundation for a healthy smile in the future
pedo.summary: The pediatric dentist is the specialist who takes care of children's smiles from their very first teeth.

surgery.title: Oral Surgery
surgery.intro: An oral surgery specialist is the dentist responsible for performing surgical procedures in the mouth, teeth and jaws when conventional treatment is not enough. They have specialized education and training to perform surgeries safely.
surgery.whatDoTitle: What does an oral surgeon do?
surgery.whatDo4: Removes cysts and lesions in the mouth
surgery.whatDo6: Performs minor soft tissue surgeries (gum tissue, frenulums)
surgery.why1: Solves problems that cannot be treated in any other way
surgery.why3: Allows recovery of oral function and health
surgery.why4: Improves the patient's quality of life
surgery.summary: The oral surgeon solves dental problems that require surgical intervention, restoring health and function to your mouth.

perio.title: Periodontics
perio.intro: A periodontics specialist is the dentist responsible for caring for the gums and the bone that support the teeth. Their work is to prevent and treat gum diseases, such as gingivitis and periodontitis.
perio.whatDo1: Treats inflamed, bleeding or infected gums
perio.whatDo3: Stops bone loss around the teeth
perio.whatDo6: Prepares the gums for implants or crowns
perio.why4: Helps preserve your smile over the long term
perio.summary: The periodontist takes care of the gums and bone that support your teeth, preventing tooth loss and keeping your smile strong.

faqsPage.heroSubtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our services, team, and clinic.
faqsPage.highlightSubtitle: We answer your most common questions.
faqsPage.clinic.q1.question: Who are we at Dentali Cactus?
faqsPage.clinic.q1.answer: We are a dental clinic founded in 2021 by Luis Jovany Arenas López, dedicated to providing quality dental care with a human, ethical, and personalized approach. We have modern facilities, cutting-edge technology, and a professional team committed to the health and trust of every patient.
faqsPage.clinic.q2.question: How long has Dentali Cactus been operating?
faqsPage.clinic.q2.answer: Dentali Cactus opened its doors on April 4, 2021.
faqsPage.clinic.q3.question: In which cities or branches do you provide care?
faqsPage.clinic.q3.answer: We have three branches: Av Bolivia and 3rd Street, Estación Coahuila km 57; Av Vicente Guerrero and 5th Street, Guadalupe Victoria km 43; and Av Tapiceros and Street I, Industrial District, Mexicali BC.
faqsPage.clinic.q4.question: What sets Dentali Cactus apart from other dental clinics?
faqsPage.clinic.q4.answer: We stand out for our human and ethical approach, personalized care, and commitment to clinical quality. At Dentali Cactus, we combine cutting-edge technology, modern facilities, and a trained professional team to offer honest diagnoses, well-planned treatments, and a safe, reliable experience—all at reasonable and competitive prices that aim to make dental care accessible without compromising quality.
faqsPage.team.q1.question: Who makes up the dental team?
faqsPage.team.q1.answer: Our team is composed of certified specialists in every branch of dentistry, including orthodontics, endodontics, periodontics, oral surgery, pediatric dentistry, cosmetic dentistry, and implantology.
faqsPage.team.q2.question: Are treatments performed by specialists?
faqsPage.team.q2.answer: Yes, each treatment is performed by a specialist in the corresponding area.
faqsPage.team.q3.question: Do you treat children, adults, and seniors?
faqsPage.team.q3.answer: Yes, we treat children, adults, and seniors, offering treatments tailored to each stage of life.
faqsPage.treatments.q1.question: Do I need an appointment or can I walk in?
faqsPage.treatments.q1.answer: We recommend scheduling an appointment for more personalized care, reduced wait times, and the best experience during your visit.
faqsPage.treatments.q2.question: What treatments do you offer?
faqsPage.treatments.q2.answer: We offer comprehensive dental care including preventive, restorative, and cosmetic treatments. We have all dental specialties.
faqsPage.treatments.q3.question: Do you perform personalized assessments and diagnoses?
faqsPage.treatments.q3.answer: Yes. We perform complete assessments and personalized diagnoses, creating treatment plans tailored to each patient's needs and goals.
faqsPage.technology.q1.question: What technology do you use for diagnosis and treatment?
faqsPage.technology.q1.answer: At our main branch, Estación Coahuila km 57, we have digital X-rays, an intraoral scanner, an orthopantomograph, and professional cameras for intraoral photography, allowing us to make precise diagnoses and plan high-quality treatments.
faqsPage.technology.q2.question: Do you have digital panoramic X-rays?
faqsPage.technology.q3.question: How do you ensure sterilization and patient safety?
faqsPage.technology.q3.answer: We comply with strict sterilization and disinfection protocols, using certified equipment and processes to ensure a safe and reliable environment for every patient.
faqsPage.payments.q1.question: What payment methods are available?
faqsPage.payments.q1.answer: We accept cash, card, bank transfer, and cash deposits at convenience stores like Oxxo, 7-Eleven, or supermarkets for your convenience.
faqsPage.payments.q2.question: Do you offer treatment plans and payment options?
faqsPage.payments.q2.answer: Yes, we offer treatment plans and payment options for some treatments, which are evaluated on a personalized basis during the assessment to provide the best option for each patient.
faqsPage.payments.q3.question: Can I request an invoice for my treatments?
faqsPage.payments.q3.answer: Yes, we issue invoices for our services in accordance with current tax requirements.
faqsPage.prevention.q1.question: How often should I visit the dentist?
faqsPage.prevention.q1.answer: It is recommended to visit the dentist every six months for check-ups and cleaning, although the frequency may vary depending on each patient's needs.
faqsPage.prevention.q2.question: What does a professional dental cleaning include?
faqsPage.prevention.q2.answer: It includes the removal of tartar and bacterial plaque, dental polishing, and a general check-up to maintain proper oral health.
faqsPage.prevention.q3.question: How can I take care of my smile after a treatment?
faqsPage.prevention.q3.answer: By following your dentist's instructions, maintaining good oral hygiene, and attending your periodic check-ups to ensure lasting results.
faqsPage.prevention.q4.question: How can I be part of Dentali Cactus?
faqsPage.prevention.q4.answer: For information on available positions, send your email to dentalicactus@gmail.com.
